sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81281" key="peridromiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιδρομ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n81281.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sidereal</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κύκλος</foreign>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συνοδικός</foreign>, of the moon, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:298:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">298.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
